prose: Big day, big burn — about 7,936 steps, six hours on your feet, and you cleared 196 grams of protein, which is exactly the kind of intake that protects your muscle while the fat comes off. You did leave an 884-calorie gap between what you ate and what you burned, which is a touch steeper than ideal — push the food a little harder on heavy days like this so you're not eating into the muscle you're working to build. Tomorrow, hold that protein right where it is and add a little more on your plate.
